_meta.purpose: Second aggressive pass — user complained AGAIN about too-easy tier-200 questions after first 233-entry removal. Be stricter.
_meta.rule: Any question a 5-year-old, a casual adult, or anyone who has briefly consumed the media would know instantly.
_meta.exempt: Capital-of-mid-tier-country Qs (kept), chemical symbols for common elements, historical-era basics requiring school knowledge, fandom basics that require having consumed the media (but not the most iconic surface-level facts).
